## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] Code compiles without errors (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] All tests pass (`npm run test`)
- [ ] Build succeeds (`npm run build:quick`)
- [ ] `manifest.json` and `package.json` versions are in sync (if bumped)
- [ ] `versions.json` updated only if `minAppVersion` changed
- [ ] No secrets or sensitive data in the diff
- [ ] PR targets `main` branch
